message:
test(providers): add comprehensive provider factory and URL normalization tests (bd-g1nx)

Add 329 lines of unit tests covering the create_provider() factory function
and URL normalization logic across all supported provider backends.

Test coverage includes:
- Built-in provider selection: Anthropic, OpenAI (completions + responses),
  Gemini, Azure, and Groq — verifying correct provider name, model_id, and
  API type for each
- URL-based provider inference: when provider name is empty/unknown, the
  factory infers the correct backend from base_url patterns (api.anthropic.com,
  api.openai.com, generativelanguage.googleapis.com, openrouter.ai,
  api.groq.com, *.openai.azure.com)
- OpenAI-compatible fallback: unknown providers with non-matching URLs
  correctly fall back to the OpenAI completions provider
- Azure deployment URL normalization: verifies that base URLs containing
  /openai/deployments/ are properly handled
- Error cases: missing API key correctly returns an error

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
